items.textHtml: [TPWRS'26] One paper (first author) on High-demand Electrical Load Forecasting accepted by IEEE Transactions on Power Systems (JCR Q1). ✨

[APEN'26] One Survey paper (coauthor) on Deep Learning for Solar Nowcasting accepted by Applied Energy (JCR Q1). ✨
[AAAI'26] One paper (first author) on extreme-adaptive TSF was accepted by AAAI 2026 (Oral). ✨
[Energy'25] One paper (coauthor) on probabilistic energy forecasting was accepted by Energy (JCR Q1). ✨

[TSG'25] One paper (first author) on causal graph learning for EVCS load forecasting was accepted by IEEE Transactions on Smart Grid (JCR Q1). ✨
[Project] My responsible Graduate Student Independent Exploration and Innovation Project of Central South University was approved.
[Study] I started my PhD at School of Automation, Central South University. 🚴
[APEN'24] One paper (first author) on dynamic graph learning for heat load forecasting was accepted by Applied Energy (JCR Q1). ✨

[Award] I won the China National Scholarship for Graduate Students for the second time.
[APEN'23] One paper (first author) on load forecasting using deep active learning got accepted by Applied Energy (JCR Q1). ✨
[Study] I will be visiting TBSI, Tsinghua University as a visiting student from July to October.
